game_name: Chester Cheetah: Too Cool to Fool

design_philosophy.core_loop: Side-scrolling platform progression with hidden collectibles (scooter parts) encouraging exploration within linear levels
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Navigation hazards and enemy avoidance while searching for hidden progression items
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Control a cool, agile mascot character (Chester Cheetah) through themed levels, embodying the character's slick persona
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Licensed IP-driven design prioritizing character representation over innovative mechanics; simple, straightforward platforming without complexity layers

progression.unlock_mechanism: Level completion gates progression; hidden scooter parts within levels suggest optional discovery-based advancement
replayability_hooks: Hidden scooter parts encourage replaying levels for 100% collection
Multiple themed environments provide variety across linear progression

world_building_techniques: Themed level environments implying Chester's journey through different locations

environmental_storytelling: Level theming carries Chester's 'cool' brand identity from 1990s advertising

sources_used: Wikipedia: Chester Cheetah article (Video games section, Chester Cheetah: Too Cool to Fool entry)
